items.title: I’m 67 with a $140,000 pension. Should I wait until 70 to claim Social Security so my wife gets more?
items.description: “When I pass, all my retirement income is reduced to $30,000 a year.”

items.title: A hot inflation reading this week could mean a rate hike soon, Fed’s Waller says
items.description: There is a chance the Federal Reserve will need to raise interest rates soon if inflation readings this week disappoint, Fed governor Christopher Waller said Monday.

items.title: Billionaires are loading up on these superior stocks. Why it pays to follow their money.
items.description: The second quarter was a six-year best for U.S. stocks — here are the three sectors poised to lead the next leg higher.

items.title: Micron and other chip stocks feel the pain of imported volatility — blame SK Hynix
items.description: The SOX chip index was suffering a unanimous selloff, after SK Hynix’s stock had its worst day in 18 years in South Korea trading.

items.title: Can big banks’ ‘cheap’ stocks keep rising? We’ll find out when JPMorgan and an unusual number of others report earnings Tuesday.
items.description: Among the largest U.S. banks, Citigroup is expected to show the greatest improvement by one important measure. But it still has a long way to go to reach its own performance target.

items.title: Global oil prices top $80 a barrel after Trump reimposes Strait of Hormuz blockade and charges 20% fee for cargo shipped through
items.description: The week is kicking off with fresh spikes for oil prices after President Donald Trump reimposed the naval blockage on the Strait of Hormuz.

items.title: ‘It’s heartbreaking’: My brother claimed Social Security at 70. He died from cancer after one payment. Why wait to claim?
items.description: “I’ve always been a little skeptical of the government’s encouragement to delay claiming benefits.”

items.title: My wife’s 2011 Ford Fiesta was totaled. Should we accept a $2,000 insurance settlement or give up the car for $2,700?
items.description: “The hood is bent, the radiator is cracked, and the front bumper is destroyed.”

items.title: I’m a bartender, yoga teacher and freelance consultant. How can I budget with such an unpredictable income?
items.description: ‘Is there a smart way to manage irregular income without feeling like every financial decision is a gamble?’

items.title: TSMC just reported a record month for revenue ahead of critical earnings report on Thursday
items.description: Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing Corp. said net revenue increased by 67% in June to $13.2 billion
